manifest_match.behavior_summary: Count how many items of `item_type_id` are directly held. When `sub_type` is `Some(s)`, only items whose `count` equals `s` are counted (mirrors C++ `getItemTypeCount` with `subType != -1`). When `sub_type` is `None`, all items of that type are counted. Mirrors C++ `Container::getItemTypeCount`.
